steps.title: Lyse cells directly in the 6-well...
steps.instruction: Lyse cells directly in the 6-well plate (add appropriate volume of RLT buffer with β-mercaptoethanol).

steps.title: Homogenise lysate and proceed with binding...
steps.instruction: Homogenise lysate and proceed with binding to RNeasy spin column per kit instructions.

steps.title: Wash with RW1 and RPE buffers;...
steps.instruction: Wash with RW1 and RPE buffers; dry spin to remove ethanol.

steps.title: Elute RNA in RNase-free water (e
steps.instruction: Elute RNA in RNase-free water (e.g., 30–50 μL). Measure concentration and purity (A260/280).

steps.title: Prepare RT master mix on ice according to kit protocol
steps.instruction: Prepare RT master mix on ice according to kit protocol.

steps.title: Combine RNA (typically 500 ng–1 μg)...
steps.instruction: Combine RNA (typically 500 ng–1 μg) with RT master mix to desired reaction volume.

steps.title: Incubate per kit cycling (genomic DNA...
steps.instruction: Incubate per kit cycling (genomic DNA wipeout if applicable) and hold on ice.

steps.title: Prepare TaqMan® master mix for each...
steps.instruction: Prepare TaqMan® master mix for each assay (Master Mix + 20× Assay + nuclease-free water).

steps.title: Dispense master mix into wells and...
steps.instruction: Dispense master mix into wells and add cDNA template (equal volume across wells).

steps.title: Seal plate, briefly spin to remove bubbles
steps.instruction: Seal plate, briefly spin to remove bubbles.

steps.title: Hold
steps.instruction: Hold: 95 °C for 10 min

steps.title: PCR (40 cycles)
steps.instruction: PCR (40 cycles): 95 °C for 15 s; 60 °C for 60 s (data acquisition at anneal/extend step)

steps.title: Confirm amplification plots and absence of signal in NTC/−RT controls
steps.instruction: Confirm amplification plots and absence of signal in NTC/−RT controls.

steps.title: For each sample and target, compute...
steps.instruction: For each sample and target, compute ΔCt = Ct(target) − Ct(GAPDH).

steps.title: Select a calibrator group (e
steps.instruction: Select a calibrator group (e.g., undifferentiated control). Compute ΔΔCt = ΔCt(sample) − mean ΔCt(calibrator).

steps.title: Fold-change = 2^(−ΔΔCt)
steps.instruction: Fold-change = 2^(−ΔΔCt). Report mean ± SEM from biological replicates.

steps.title: Reproducible triplicate Ct values (SD ≤ 0
steps.instruction: Reproducible triplicate Ct values (SD ≤ 0.3 cycles). Clear separation between target and NTC/−RT.

steps.title: High Ct variability → check pipetting accuracy and RNA integrity
steps.instruction: High Ct variability → check pipetting accuracy and RNA integrity.

steps.title: Signal in NTC/−RT → assess contamination...
steps.instruction: Signal in NTC/−RT → assess contamination or gDNA carryover; include DNase step.

steps.title: Low efficiency → verify assay IDs...
steps.instruction: Low efficiency → verify assay IDs and storage; avoid freeze-thaw cycles.
